name: Sloth
description: Sloths are slow-moving arboreal mammals that spend most of their lives hanging upside down in the trees of tropical rainforests. Their incredibly slow metabolism means they can take up to a month to digest a single meal, and they descend to the ground only about once a week.
funFacts: Move so slowly that algae grows on their fur, providing camouflage
Can take up to a month to digest a single leaf
Only descend from trees about once a week to defecate
Have an extra neck vertebra letting them turn their heads 270 degrees
